channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Reports Xi Supports Reopening Strait of Hormuz, China Remains Neutral
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced that during his recent talks in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping agreed that Iran should reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil route. Despite this, Chi...

item.title: St Kilda defeats injury-hit Richmond ahead of key upcoming matches
item.description: St Kilda has secured a 36-point victory over an injury-plagued Richmond side at Marvel Stadium, moving into ninth place on the AFL ladder. Coach Ross Lyon highlighted that the win provides an opportun...

item.title: US-Based Kenyan Nurse Found Dead on Same Day Her Twin Daughters Graduate
item.description: In Minnesota, what was supposed to be a day of joy turned into deep sorrow for the Omoke family. Jessica Omoke, a 51-year-old Kenyan nurse living in the United States, was reported missing for two day...

item.title: World Cup 2026: Cultural Exchange and Challenges in the US
item.description: The 2026 men’s FIFA World Cup go happen for USA, Canada, and Mexico from 11 June. Na the biggest World Cup ever, with 48 teams and plenty matches for USA, including the final. This World Cup dey impor...

item.title: PGF Chairman Uzodinma Faces Scrutiny Over Shettima’s Involvement in Tinubu’s Form Submission
item.description: Dem talk say President Bola Tinubu go announce him running mate for 2027 presidential election dis week. Na so reports from Nigerian Tribune yarn say small wahala happen wen Tinubu submit him Expressi...

item.title: Study shows reliance on water tankers worsens shortages and corruption in South African municipalities
item.description: For plenty towns and cities for South Africa, people no fit trust say water go come from tap again. Water tankers don turn from emergency solution to everyday way for many communities, especially info...

item.title: Tippi Hedren: A Look at Her Early Career in 1950s Fashion
item.description: Before achieving fame as a leading actress in Alfred Hitchcock’s 'The Birds,' Tippi Hedren built an impressive career as a fashion model during the 1950s and early 1960s. Discovered at the age of 20, ...

item.title: Western Cape communities receive flood relief support through WPCA and Gift of the Givers initiative
item.description: The Western Province Cricket Association (WPCA) has teamed up with the humanitarian organisation Gift of the Givers to assist communities in the Western Cape affected by recent deadly floods. Followin...

item.title: Reforming Oversight of Immigration Consultants in Canada
item.description: Canada's immigration system faces significant challenges due to unscrupulous and unregulated immigration consultants. Many temporary workers, international students, and refugee claimants have been ex...

item.title: EWURA Inspects East African Crude Oil Pipeline Progress and Compliance
item.description: The Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA) board of directors has shown satisfaction with the ongoing construction of the East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP), which stretches from...

item.title: Tanzania Development Bank posts strong financial growth in recent period
item.description: Tanzania Development Bank (TADB) has reported significant progress in its financial performance, showing rapid growth in its assets and overall financial stability. The bank's recent results indicate ...

item.title: Iconic 1968 Pink Floyd Portraits Wrapped in Pink Fabric
item.description: In August 1968, the English rock band Pink Floyd participated in a striking portrait session in Los Angeles, captured by photographer Michael Ochs. The photos feature the classic four-man lineup of Ni...

item.title: Alex Smalley takes two-shot lead into final round of PGA Championship at Aronimink
item.description: Alex Smalley carded a two-under 68 in the third round to claim a two-shot lead at six under par heading into the final day of the 2026 PGA Championship at Aronimink Golf Club. The American recovered w...

item.title: California Voters Express Uncertainty and Concern Ahead of 2026 Governor Race
item.description: As California's 2026 gubernatorial race nears the primary, voters across the San Gabriel Valley are expressing widespread uncertainty and disillusionment. Democrat Xavier Becerra has unexpectedly rise...

item.title: Two First-Year SUZA Students Tragically Drown at Kizingo Beach
item.description: On Saturday, May 16, 2026, two first-year students from the State University of Zanzibar (SUZA) tragically lost their lives while swimming at Kizingo Beach in Unguja. The students, Thobiasi Chikakalan...

item.title: PM commits to completing all delayed projects in Tanzania
item.description: Tanzania's Prime Minister has reassured citizens and stakeholders that all stalled development projects across the country will be completed on time. During recent statements, the PM highlighted the g...

item.title: Radio as a tool to improve literacy in Nigeria
item.description: Every Saturday for ten years, Nigerians gather around their radios for *Book on Review with Benji*, a show wey dey push the message say 'A nation wey no dey read no fit develop.' Host Benjamin Okoh do...

item.title: Alison Victoria says a single misused word affected her return to HGTV's Battle on the Beach
item.description: Former 'Battle on the Beach' co-host Alison Victoria revealed that a single word she used may have cost her a return to HGTV's seaside design competition. In an interview with the Daily Mail, Victoria...

item.title: Controversy over reopening of Vancouver supervised consumption site
item.description: The B.C. NDP government is planning to reopen the Thomas Donaghy Overdose Prevention Site (TDOPS) in downtown Vancouver, despite opposition from the city’s mayor and council. Previously, the site face...

item.title: Peter Marrone to Chair Challenger Gold and Lead $80 Million Capital Raising
item.description: Challenger Gold, currently suspended from trading, is undergoing significant corporate changes behind the scenes. Its brokers are preparing a major capital raising of $80 million, aimed at strengtheni...
